activities.details: I killed 12 Vindictas, all heavily armoured dragon riders.
I killed 2 Vindictas, all heavily armoured dragon riders.
Completing Merlin's Crystal has given me enough Quest Points to pass the 150 QP milestone.
Merlin was trapped in a crystal by Morgan Le Fay, but I freed him using an ancient spell. I am now a Knight of the Round Table.
I levelled my Runecrafting skill, I am now level 91.
I levelled my Runecrafting skill, I am now level 90.
I killed 22 Vindictas, all heavily armoured dragon riders.
I killed 19 Vindictas, all heavily armoured dragon riders.
I met Cyrisus and travelled the strange dream land again. Hopefully, he's still off adventuring.
I now know the mystical Moon Clan fairly well and they can hopefully start to live in peace with the Fremennik.
I have unlocked a total of 800 songs, the last of which was A Feast to Die For.
I levelled my Construction skill, I am now level 91.
I helped King Roald establish a new duchy in the wilderness which I now manage.
I killed 3 Vindictas, all heavily armoured dragon riders.
I killed 5 Vindictas, all heavily armoured dragon riders.
I now have at least 64000000 experience points in the Necromancy skill.
I killed 2 Vindictas, all heavily armoured dragon riders.
I killed 6 Vindictas, all heavily armoured dragon riders.
By proving my might, my cunning and lots of other things, I have become an honorary Fremennik and been awarded a new name.
I killed  An ancient wyrm, now a devourer: Vermyx, the Brood Mother.
